/usr/bin/ar qc libimgui.a "CMakeFiles/imgui.dir/_deps/imgui-src/imgui.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/imgui.dir/_deps/imgui-src/imgui_draw.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/imgui.dir/_deps/imgui-src/imgui_tables.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/imgui.dir/_deps/imgui-src/imgui_widgets.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/imgui.dir/_deps/imgui-src/backends/imgui_impl_glfw.cpp.o" CMakeFiles/imgui.dir/imgui_opengl3_epoxy.cpp.o
/usr/bin/ranlib libimgui.a
